content:
Conceptually I've really come around to some of the woo woo affirmations and interconnectedness of the world. I'm still not sure how to consciously put any of that into practice. I don't feel like the subconscious is making changes for me... Maybe it takes time? I would rather find a way to fill the gap myself. 

I don't mind helping people but I like to do it on my own terms. I can't wait for the day I'm no longer responsible for picking up after others
